data.content: Plan review approved. All referenced code structures confirmed to exist (SyncError::ActiveLeasesExist, sync_pending metadata, termination paths in lease.rs and write_dispatch.rs). No lock/reentrancy risks. Reusing sync_pending is the right call. Notes for implementer: (1) target files already exceed 500-line limit, minimize additions; (2) JSON shape extension should use optional field for backward compat; (3) best-effort trigger must not fail the lease termination command.
